# Social icons (base64) — code only

Use: `png_bytes = base64.b64decode(SOCIAL_ICONS["discord"])` then upload via `POST /api/assets/upload?app_id=<id>&file=discord.png` and reference in an `image` element. Keys: `discord`, `facebook`, `instagram`, `linkedin`, `pinterest`, `reddit`, `spotify`, `tiktok`, `youtube`.

```python
import base64

SOCIAL_ICONS = {
    "discord": "",
    "facebook": "",
    "instagram": "",
    "linkedin": "",
    "pinterest": "",
    "reddit": "",
    "spotify": "",
    "tiktok": "",
    "youtube": "",
}
```
